current_gap.interpretation: Existing selected-action and residual-backed responses cannot prove strict rescue close source truth until close actions are explicitly selected or modeled into a request.

inputs_reviewed.replay_store_context: REPLAY_STORE_V2_MANIFEST and existing builder lookup contract; no broad replay strategy search

label: KEEP_STRICT_RESCUE_CLOSE_REQUEST_SCHEMA_SELECTED

next_action.description: Implement local no-network strict rescue close request/fixture validator or builder extension only if a selected close-action fixture with the required fields can be generated from local selected candidate artifacts; otherwise return UNKNOWN with exact missing fields.

pass_fail_criteria.DISCARD: The plan requires replay_store_v2 broad strategy search, hard-coded fee rates, external private truth, or starts from replay rows instead of selected close actions.
pass_fail_criteria.KEEP: A future local implementation can build <=30 selected close requests from selected candidate/close-action data with all required close fields and produce SOURCE_TRUTH_VALIDATED_RESEARCH_ONLY while private_truth_ready/deployable/promotion_gate remain false.
pass_fail_criteria.UNKNOWN: Close action source fields are absent or cannot be mapped to day/condition/close_ts/side/qty/px/source rows; name exact missing columns.

research_ranking.interpretation: A concrete strict rescue close selected-request schema is selected. This is local source-truth validation planning only.
research_ranking.label: KEEP_STRICT_RESCUE_CLOSE_REQUEST_SCHEMA_SELECTED

output_contract.action_decisions: action_decisions.csv remains selected seed/action-level validation output
output_contract.residual_fifo_lots: residual_fifo_lots.csv remains seed/residual lot linkage output
output_contract.score: truth_validation_response_action_scorer score.json should report strict close row count, missing fields, fee/source completeness, and private/promotion guards
output_contract.strict_rescue_closes: strict_rescue_closes.csv rows including close_action_id, close_ts_ms, close_side, close_qty, close_px, official_fee, fee_rate, fee_rate_source, book_l1_ref, book_l2_ref, trade_before_ref, trade_after_ref, validation_status, reasons

selected_schema_spec.purpose: Selected-action replay/source-truth validation of strict second-leg rescue close timing, side, qty, cost, fee, and source linkage.
selected_schema_spec.request_scope: selected close actions only; not a strategy search and not a replay scan

source_truth_boundary.corrected_sequence: public/proxy inspiration -> local candidate/replay research -> replay_store_v2 source-truth validation -> no-order/shadow review -> controlled canary/small execution -> our own private order/fill/inventory truth validation -> deployable/scale review

why_now: Residual seed action and FIFO lot source-truth response is now covered and scored. The named remaining source-truth gap is strict rescue close timing/cost/source linkage.
